  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    MotionPlannerThread
    Medium Priority Thread (Priority 5) - Sends movement commands.
    MotorController
    Shared Resource: Motor Controller (Baseline - No Protocol) Tasks 1, 2, 3.
    MotorControllerCeiling
    Shared Resource: Motor Controller with Priority Ceiling Protocol.
    MotorControllerInheritance
    Shared Resource: Motor Controller with Priority Inheritance Protocol.
    PerformanceEvaluator
    Task 6: Performance Evaluation
    PriorityInversionScenario
    Orchestrator for demonstrating Priority Inversion and Protocols.
    RoboticArmLogger
    Thread-safe logger for the robotic arm system.
    RoboticArmMain
    Main entry point for Project Three.
    SafetyMonitorThread
    High Priority Thread (Priority 8) - Detects emergency conditions and stops the arm.
    SystemLoggerThread
    Low Priority Thread (Priority 2) - Records system activity.
